title: Outdated DOT Regs Are Forcing Chevy to Call 3/4-Ton Electric Trucks “Half-Tons”—And It’s Killing the Electric Suburban
description:
In many ways, the region around El Paso is kind of a “backwater.” We don’t have much water, actually, but we do have lots of beach in the form of desert sands! When a new EV model comes out, we’re often the last place where you’ll see one on the ... [continued]

The post Outdated DOT Regs Are Forcing Chevy to Call 3/4-Ton Electric Trucks “Half-Tons”—And It’s Killing the Electric Suburban appeared first on CleanTechnica.
